sys_ui_page.description:
New UI Page to prompt from Platform about publishing draft tasks
2.8 | 2022-09-16 | mmcc | STRY0129676 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - Unsafe Jelly Statements For field HTML, updated any ${expression} to ${HTML:expression} per Certifier Basic test: if ${HTML:expression} failed then style sheet is not loaded and no lines are centered 2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish'
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Tasker - Please choose to publish only the top task or all of its subtasks as well Tasker - Button - Confirm Tasker - This Task Only Tasker - This Task and all {0} Subtasks var messageOpenTasksCount = ''; var descendantsCount = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); descendantsCount = taskerHelpers.getDraftDescendantsCount(jelly.jvar_taskSysId); messDescendantsCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - This Task and all {0} Subtasks', [descendantsCount]);
${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Please choose to publish only the top task or all of its subtasks as well')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Confirm')}
sys_ui_page.name: publiish_draft_task_prompt
